title: cinchona capuli
intro: Cinchona capuli, also known as Peruvian cinchona, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a medicinal plant that has been traditionally used for its anti-inflammatory, antipyretic, and antimalarial properties, thanks to the presence of quinine and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Cinchona capuli include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as protection against malaria and other diseases. Cinchona capuli is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is used in traditional medicine, often in combination with other herbs, to promote overall well-being and support immune function.
